mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_tasks ( id, room_id, title, description, deadline_at, status, created_by_user_id, created_by_username, created_by_name, assignee_user_id, assignee_username, assignee_name, created_at, completed_at, confirmed_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{roomId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{deadlineAt}, #{status}, #{createdByUserId}, #{createdByUsername}, #{createdByName}, #{assigneeUserId}, #{assigneeUsername}, #{assigneeName}, #{createdAt}, #{completedAt}, #{confirmedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, room_id, title, description, deadline_at, status, created_by_user_id, created_by_username, created_by_name, assignee_user_id, assignee_username, assignee_name, created_at, completed_at, confirmed_at FROM chat_tasks WHERE room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN status = 'PENDING' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, deadline_at ASC, created_at DESC

SELECT id, room_id, title, description, deadline_at, status, created_by_user_id, created_by_username, created_by_name, assignee_user_id, assignee_username, assignee_name, created_at, completed_at, confirmed_at FROM chat_tasks WHERE id = #{taskId} AND room_id = #{roomId}
